data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of payment links per participant.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Payment links per participant', but the evidence provided does not include any details about individual payment statuses or links for each participant in the booking. The existing evidence only confirms that two customers have made bookings, but it lacks the necessary granularity to demonstrate that payment links were provided to each participant. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of payment links provided to each participant in the booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the provision of payment links per participant.
